{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Thought-conduction alloy
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Engineer ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Thought-conduction alloy]] is contained within the [[Shadow Ark]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c29">''The Engineer'', chapter 29</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Thought-conduction alloy]] is a valuable material that [[Horizon]] can fabricate.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c32">''The Engineer'', chapter 32</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
